name: modly
description: Desktop app to generate 3D models from images using local AI — runs entirely on your GPU
readme_summary: Modly is an open-source desktop application that leverages local AI models running on your GPU to generate 3D models from 2D images. It supports an extension system for integrating various AI models and is available for Windows and Linux, with macOS support planned.
primary_use_case: Generating 3D models from images using local AI processing.
cover_image_prompt: A magical artisan in a dimly lit workshop, holding a flat, ordinary photograph in one hand. With their other hand, they are sculpting a glowing, intricate 3D model that is emerging directly from the photograph. Wisps of digital light and code particles flow from the photo to the emerging 3D object, symbolizing the AI transformation. In the background, subtle UI elements of the Modly application are visible on a workbench, showing progress bars and model previews. The overall mood is one of creation and technological wonder. The art style should be a detailed digital painting with a focus on dramatic lighting and clear visual metaphor, emphasizing the transformation from 2D to 3D.

name: plain-app
description: 🔥 PlainApp is an open-source app that lets you securely manage your phone from a web browser. Access files, media, contacts, SMS, calls, and more through a simple, easy-to-use interface on your desktop.
readme_summary: PlainApp is an open-source Android application that provides a secure, self-hosted web interface for managing your phone from any device on the same network. It offers a comprehensive suite of tools for file management, media browsing, communication, and even screen mirroring, all without relying on cloud services.
key_features: Web-based phone management (no desktop app needed)
File browsing, upload, download, rename, delete
Contacts, SMS, and call log management
Live screen mirroring with remote control
Built-in tools: Markdown notes, RSS reader, media player, P2P chat, Pomodoro timer
primary_use_case: Securely managing and accessing an Android phone's data and features from a web browser on the same local network, without relying on cloud services.
cover_image_prompt: A digital bridge seamlessly connecting a smartphone on one side to a laptop on the other, with data flowing securely across. The smartphone is depicted as a secure vault, with icons representing files, photos, and messages emerging from it. The laptop displays a clean, organized dashboard interface, showing these elements being managed. Subtle glowing lines of encryption (TLS + XChaCha20-Poly1305) wrap around the data flow, emphasizing security. The PlainApp logo is subtly integrated into the bridge structure. The overall scene is clean, modern, and uses a color palette of blues and greens to convey trust and efficiency. The style is a 3D isometric illustration with soft lighting and clear, distinct elements.

name: unifi-docker
readme_summary: This repository provides a Dockerized version of Ubiquiti's Unifi Controller, simplifying installation, management, and upgrades. It bundles the controller, Java, and OS dependencies into a single container, ensuring a consistent environment across various operating systems and hardware.
key_features: Cross-platform compatibility (Ubuntu, Debian, macOS, Windows, Raspberry Pi)
Persistent data storage outside the container
primary_use_case: To provide an easy-to-deploy and manage Unifi Network Controller instance using Docker, abstracting away underlying system dependencies and complexities.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan carefully placing a perfectly crafted, self-contained 'digital workshop' (representing the Unifi Controller) onto a workbench. This workshop is a glowing, transparent cube, inside which tiny gears and circuits hum efficiently. The artisan is connecting a series of network cables to the workshop, which then instantly sprout into organized, glowing network diagrams and device icons. The background is a clean, organized workspace with subtle code snippets visible on a nearby screen. The overall mood is one of effortless setup and robust functionality. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style with a clean, modern aesthetic and vibrant, tech-inspired colors.

name: TaxHacker
description: Self-hosted AI accounting app. LLM analyzer for receipts, invoices, transactions with custom prompts and categories
readme_summary: TaxHacker is a self-hosted AI-powered accounting application designed to automate expense and income tracking for freelancers and small businesses. It leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to extract data from receipts and invoices, supports multi-currency conversions, and allows for custom data extraction through user-defined prompts.
key_features: AI-powered data extraction from receipts and invoices (OCR)
Multi-currency support with historical exchange rates (including crypto)
Support for various LLMs including OpenAI, Gemini, Mistral, and local models via Ollama
Structured data storage with filtering and import/export
Customizable data extraction with user-defined AI prompts
primary_use_case: Automating the extraction and organization of financial data from receipts and invoices using AI for accounting and tax purposes, with a focus on self-hosting and data privacy.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old owl, symbolizing accounting knowledge, perched on a stack of digital receipts and invoices. The owl is using a magnifying glass that projects glowing, organized data streams (representing extracted information) onto a clean, minimalist desk. Subtle UI elements showing categorized transactions and currency conversion rates are visible on a nearby screen. The background is a softly lit, modern home office, hinting at the self-hosted nature. The TaxHacker logo is subtly integrated into the scene. The overall style is a warm, inviting 3D isometric illustration with clear, friendly visuals.

name: TradingAgents
description: TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework
readme_summary: TradingAgents is a Python framework designed for multi-agent financial trading using Large Language Models (LLMs). It enables the creation of autonomous trading agents that can research markets, make trading decisions, and manage portfolios.
key_features: Support for various LLM providers (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, Grok, etc.)
Structured output agents for research, trading, and portfolio management
Persistent decision logging and LangGraph checkpoint resume
Configurability via environment variables and API-key auto-detection
primary_use_case: To develop and deploy autonomous AI agents for automated financial trading and market analysis.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old owl, representing an AI trading agent, perched on a branch made of glowing financial charts and data streams. The owl is holding a magnifying glass, peering intently at a complex stock market graph that is subtly transforming into clear, actionable insights. Below, a small, stylized cityscape with miniature trading terminals flickers with digital energy. Subtle code snippets and data visualizations are etched into the bark of the branch. The scene is set at dawn, symbolizing new opportunities, with a soft, analytical glow emanating from the owl and the data. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic, emphasizing clarity and intelligence.
